title: Explicit Animations
description: Full control with AnimationController and Tweens.

slides.title: Explicit Animations 🎛️
slides.content:
# Explicit Animations

For complex or custom animations, use `AnimationController` and `Tween`.

* `AnimationController` controls the animation (duration, direction, etc.)
* `Tween` defines the range of values.
* You must dispose the controller.
* Use `AnimatedBuilder` or `AnimatedWidget` to rebuild during animation.

quizData.question: What must you always do with an AnimationController?
quizData.explanation: Controllers must be disposed to prevent memory leaks.

slides.title: Explicit Animation Example
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use `vsync` to improve performance

`SingleTickerProviderStateMixin` provides a vsync that prevents off-screen animations from consuming resources.
